offer.name: 30-min Strategy Audit (free)
offer.promise: In 30 minutes, identify the top 3 leverage points to double your B2B conversion rate without ad spend
offer.audience: Solo coaches and consultants, $80k-200k yearly revenue, English-speaking, US/UK/CA market
proof_points: Average client adds $40k-80k yearly revenue within 6 months
objections: I'm not sure what to expect from a free audit
I've talked to other coaches, none worked
I don't have time for another call

goal.notes: Top of funnel — book audits, qualify on call

input.brief: Free audit lead magnet to fill the calendar. Target audience: solo coaches in English markets, frustrated with paid ads, looking for organic growth. Angle: most coaches confuse 'visibility' with 'leverage'. The audit shows the 3 leverage points specific to their situation.

notes: Tests EN-language generation + lead-gen goal. Channel Strategist should prioritize LinkedIn long-form and X threads.
